verification_note: PDF-first audit from Santhanam Vol 1 pp.186-189. All 14 verses verified, 0 gaps.

claims.claim: 12th lord strong / with benefic / in own house / exalted -> expenses on good accounts, beautiful houses, scented articles
12th lord in 6th/8th or debilitation Navamsa -> devoid of happiness from wife, troubled by expenses
Bhavat bhavam principle: predict relative events from derived houses (methodological rule)
Planets in visible half give explicit results; invisible half gives secret results
Rahu + Mars + Saturn + Sun in 12th + 12th lord with Sun -> native will go to hell (severe karmic consequences)
Benefic exalted in 12th or conjunct/aspected by benefic -> attain final emancipation (moksha)
12th lord and 12th house with malefics aspected by malefics -> wander from country to country
12th lord and 12th with benefics -> move in own country and progress
12th occupied by Saturn/Mars + not aspected by benefic -> earnings through sinful measures
Ascendant lord in 12th + Venus in 12th -> expenses on religious grounds
